$comment: Design token file for the Notification component
$description: Full-width mobile notification row (393px). Renders a contact avatar on the left and a content column on the right. Four content types each render different body structures: Conversation shows a preview message with no container; Custom shows a body-text card with white background; Task shows only the title + location row with no body card; Appointment shows a bordered card with a date chip, appointment title, and time range. All types share the same header row (mixed-weight title, dots menu, unread dot) and timestamp. Unread rows have a light blue tint background; Read rows are white. Hover and Pressed states exist for all variants (exact background values require per-state verification).

gap.description: 8px horizontal gap between the avatar column and the content column

width.description: Separator line below each notification row

unread.description: #f5f8ff — very light primary blue tint applied to unread notification rows

read.description: White background for read notification rows

size.description: 40px — width and height of the circular avatar

left-padding.description: Slight left inset on the avatar column to visually align with content

conversation.description: Company logo badge shown at the bottom-right of the avatar for Conversation-type notifications

size.description: Width and height of the company logo badge

border-radius.description: Half of badge size — fully rounded square

background.description: White background behind the company logo icon

other-types.description: Small icon badge at the bottom-right of the avatar for Custom, Task, and Appointment notifications

size.description: Width and height of the type icon badge

background.description: #f2f4f7 — muted background for the icon badge

icon-size.description: Icon fills the full badge area

gap.description: 8px vertical gap between header row, body section, location row, action row, and timestamp

title-width.description: Fixed width for the title text block — leaves 35px for the dots menu + unread dot on the right

typography.description: 14px Regular base — action/event text in the title. Name runs are rendered as inline Semibold spans

name-color.description: #004eeb — contact name highlighted in primary blue within the title

action-text-color.description: #475467 — remaining action/event description text in the title

icon-size.description: Width and height of the three-dots overflow menu icon

icon-name.description: GHL icon name for the notification overflow menu

size.description: Outer container size for the unread status indicator

inner-size.description: Filled dot size inside the 12px container (offset 1.2px from edge)

color.description: #155eef — primary blue fill for the unread dot; hidden when status is Read

conversation.description: Conversation-type body: plain preview text with no container background

with-background.description: Custom-type body: preview text inside a white rounded card

background.description: White card background for Custom-type body text

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius on the body text card

padding.description: 8px inset on all sides of the body text card

typography.description: 14px Medium, 20px line-height — body text inside the card

color.description: #475467 — body text color inside the card

appointment.description: Appointment-type body: bordered card with a date chip on the left and appointment details on the right

background.description: White card background for the appointment body

color.description: #155eef — primary blue border highlights the appointment card

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius on the appointment card

padding.description: 8px inset on all sides of the appointment card

gap.description: Gap between the date chip and the appointment details text column

background.description: #eaecf0 — muted gray background for the date chip

border-radius.description: 8px corner radius on the date chip

padding.description: 4px inset on all sides of the date chip

typography.description: 14px Medium, 20px line-height — appointment title and time range text

location-row.description: Appears below the body on Custom, Task, and Appointment types. Shows a 'Location :' label and the location/pipeline value.

gap.description: 8px gap between the label and the value

typography.description: 12px Medium, 17px line-height — location or pipeline name

color.description: #98a2b3 — muted gray for the location value

subtext.description: Bottom text line in Conversation-type notifications — shows the contact's company or pipeline context (e.g. 'Product @ Highlevel')

conversation.description: #004eeb — timestamp shown in primary blue for Conversation-type unread notifications

default.description: #667085 — timestamp color for Custom, Task, and Appointment types
